meta.title: Founder Residencies, Hacker Houses & Startup Campuses — Global Database
meta.note: Recruiting status reflects best-available public info as of June 2026 and changes frequently. Always confirm on the program's own site. Logos load via a multi-source loader (Clearbit → DuckDuckGo → Google favicon) with an initials fallback.

status_legend.rolling: Accepts applications on a rolling/always-open basis
status_legend.open: A specific cohort window is currently open
status_legend.closing-soon: Open but with an imminent deadline
status_legend.opening-soon: Next cohort applications announced, opening shortly
status_legend.closed: Latest cohort closed; check site for next cycle

meta.scope: Curated to founder programs with a genuine residential, co-living, or relocation component (residencies, hacker houses, startup campuses, coliving). Traditional accelerators and talent investors without a live-in/relocation element (e.g. Antler, EF, YC, Techstars, a16z Speedrun) are intentionally excluded.

programs.name: Founders, Inc. (f.inc)
programs.focus: AI, hardware, robotics, AR/VR, web3, consumer
programs.status_detail: Rolling applications; time-boxed residencies (4–7 wks). Up to $250K for 4–7%.
programs.highlight: 42,000 sq ft campus at Fort Mason with hardware lab, media studio, gym; desks for ~80 founders.

programs.name: South Park Commons
programs.status_detail: Spring 2026 cohort underway; Fall 2026 apps open summer 2026. Up to $1M ($400K for 7% + $600K next round).
programs.highlight: Offices in SF, NYC & Bangalore. Built for founders before they have an idea.

programs.name: South Park Commons — NYC
programs.status_detail: Fellows may work from the NYC office. Fall 2026 apps open summer 2026.
programs.highlight: East-coast hub of the SPC fellowship.

programs.name: South Park Commons — Bangalore
programs.status_detail: India hub of the SPC fellowship. Fall 2026 apps open summer 2026.
programs.highlight: Asia hub of the SPC fellowship.

programs.name: HF0 (Hacker Fellowship Zero)
programs.status_detail: 12-week live-in residency, ~10 founders. Up to $1M uncapped SAFE for 5%.
programs.highlight: Housed in the historic 22,000 sq ft Archbishop's Mansion by Alamo Square ('the Monastery of Code').

programs.name: AGI House SF
programs.status_detail: Events & residencies for AI builders; perched atop Twin Peaks.
programs.highlight: Brings hackathon culture back to SF; AGI House Ventures invests up to $1M.

programs.name: AGI House (Hillsborough)
programs.status_detail: Palatial AI hacker house with its own venture fund (separate from the SF house).
programs.highlight: The original Peninsula AGI House; AGI House Ventures backs residents.

programs.name: The Residency — SF Parc
programs.status_detail: 3-month cohorts: housing + co-working + community. 'College meets accelerator.'
programs.highlight: Flagship Presidio house; part of a global network of homes.

programs.name: The Residency — Arcadia (Berkeley)
programs.status_detail: 3-month live-in cohorts in the East Bay.
programs.highlight: Berkeley house in The Residency network.

programs.name: The Residency — Homebrew (NYC)
programs.status_detail: 3-month live-in cohorts in NYC.
programs.highlight: East-coast house in The Residency network.

programs.name: The Residency — Londinium
programs.status_detail: AI-focused 5-bedroom home connected to central London.
programs.highlight: London AI house in The Residency network.

programs.name: The Residency — Bangalore
programs.status_detail: HSR Layout co-living with weekly successful-founder mentors.
programs.highlight: India house in The Residency network.

programs.name: The Residency — Aurea (Berlin)
programs.focus: Deep tech — builders, scientists & engineers chasing breakthroughs
programs.status_detail: Aurea: sister house to Arcadia for those chasing breakthroughs; intense focus & deep collaboration.
programs.highlight: Berlin deep-tech house (Aurea) in The Residency network.

programs.name: Foundry (Foundry Coliving)
programs.status_detail: Residency-style coliving; 100+ founders & engineers have lived there.
programs.highlight: Self-styled 'Number One Hacker House' in SF.

programs.name: Accelr8
programs.status_detail: Where founders live: co-living + co-working community.
programs.highlight: Residency program blending housing and workspace for founders.

programs.name: STAK Space
programs.status_detail: Billed as the world's largest hacker house.
programs.highlight: Large-scale East Bay hacker house.

programs.name: FoundHer House
programs.status_detail: All-female co-living/working space for women founders.
programs.highlight: Designed to foster women-led tech startups.

programs.name: Startup Embassy
programs.status_detail: Established co-living for founders coming to the Valley.
programs.highlight: Long-running Silicon Valley founder house.

programs.name: Georgia Tech Hacker House
programs.status_detail: Collaborative 9-month build program for students.
programs.highlight: University-run hacker house for student founders.

programs.name: Casa Bernarda
programs.status_detail: Co-living & co-working space in the Yucatán.
programs.highlight: LatAm builder house in Mérida.

programs.name: AbadiaDev
programs.status_detail: Collaborative space for the Web3/crypto ecosystem.
programs.highlight: Argentina's Web3 builder community house.

programs.name: Hacker Paradise
programs.status_detail: Work-remotely co-living experience for productivity & community.
programs.highlight: Long-running global nomad/builder community.

programs.name: FR8 (Hacker Hotel)
programs.status_detail: Billed as the world's first 'hacker hotel.'
programs.highlight: Resort-style stay + collaborative tech environment.

programs.name: Pluto (AI Hacker House)
programs.status_detail: AI/robotics residential workspace (also Paris).
programs.highlight: Shared residential workspace for AI/robotics builders.

programs.name: HackerHouse.world
programs.status_detail: Network across Bordeaux, Berlin, Venice, Rome, Dublin & London.
programs.highlight: Multi-city European hacker-house network.

programs.name: Bali Hacker House (The Collective)
programs.status_detail: Residential hub for intense collaboration among builders.
programs.highlight: Southeast-Asia builder residence.

programs.name: Labsmart Hacker House
programs.status_detail: Opened July 2025 in HSR Layout; build-and-ship-daily ethos.
programs.highlight: Workspace for builders in Bangalore's startup hub.

programs.name: Build Club / Build Campus
programs.status_detail: 6-week AI residency; launching Build Campus as Australia's first permanent AI builder residency.
programs.highlight: Recreated SF hacker-house energy (AGI House, HF0, Founders Inc) in Australia.

programs.name: Edge Esmeralda
programs.status_detail: Month-long pop-up village May 30–Jun 27, 2026; includes founder residencies. Prototype for permanent village 'Esmeralda.'
programs.highlight: 500+ builders gather in Sonoma County; precursor to a permanent town.

programs.name: Neo (Accelerator / Residency)
programs.status_detail: Neo Residency: 3 months SF + 2-week Oregon bootcamp; $750K uncapped SAFE + $450K credits.
programs.highlight: Low-dilution residency replacing the original Neo Accelerator (Feb 2026).

programs.name: Forge — Bangalore (Cohort 1)
programs.status_detail: Cohort 1 live. Short live-in residency for 'the obsessed'; monthly 'Void' hackathon awards a black-ticket seat. Founders now backed by YC, EF & SPC.
programs.highlight: Born in Mumbai (Cohort 0, Mar 2026); 'a sanctuary for the contrarian.' EST 2026.

programs.name: Forge — Bali (Cohort 2)
programs.status_detail: Cohort 2 open. Closes Forge's first year across three cities (Mumbai → Bangalore → Bali).
programs.highlight: Bali leg of the Forge residency triad.

programs.name: Forge — Dubai (Cohort 3)
programs.status_detail: Cohort 3 announced as upcoming ('Dubai · soon').
programs.highlight: Forge's planned Middle East expansion.

programs.name: Arrayah (Araya) — Sydney
programs.status_detail: Houses 'Billabong' (Drummoyne) & 'Banksia'; 9-resident homes with coworking + hardware lab. Runs a 14-day residency.
programs.highlight: Australia's hacker-house experiment — 'a campfire for founders, artists and researchers.'

programs.name: Arrayah (Araya) — Melbourne
programs.status_detail: Melbourne home announced as launching soon.
programs.highlight: Arrayah's Victoria expansion.

programs.name: Arrayah (Araya) — Brisbane
programs.status_detail: Brisbane home announced as launching soon.
programs.highlight: Arrayah's Queensland expansion.

programs.name: Network School
programs.focus: Builders, creators & founders; 'startup society' (learn, burn, earn)
programs.status_detail: Rolling enrollment on a hotel-turned-campus near Singapore; hundreds of residents. Planned locations in Miami, Dubai & Tokyo.
programs.highlight: Balaji Srinivasan's 'Network State' made physical — adjacent to, but broader than, a founder residency.

programs.name: The Foundery
programs.focus: Turning founder-mindset individuals into investible companies
programs.status_detail: 90-day residency at 'Foundery Sanctum'; part school/accelerator/venture studio. Builders retain up to 25% equity; up to ~Rs 4 crore seed.
programs.highlight: High-profile Indian 'co-founder factory' from Zerodha's Nikhil Kamath & Future Group's Kishore Biyani.

programs.name: The Residency — Vienna
programs.status_detail: European house in The Residency network; 3-month live-in cohorts.
programs.highlight: Vienna house in The Residency network.

programs.name: Founders House — Stockholm
programs.focus: Ambitious tech founders; equity-free elite cohort
programs.status_detail: Selective, equity-free 24/7 workspace + community. Launched 2025; 80+ startups supported in year one. Luntmakargatan 34.
programs.highlight: Nordic 'residents' model — no equity, all resources free.

programs.name: Founders House — Helsinki
programs.status_detail: Helsinki hub opened early 2026, expanding the Stockholm model.
programs.highlight: Finnish expansion of Founders House.

programs.name: London Founder House
programs.focus: 'The most obsessed founders in London' (non-competing markets)
programs.status_detail: Hacker house + residency + community. Notably asks residents to have raised ~$500k. Live-and-build SF energy in London.
programs.highlight: Founder mansion offering acceptance & community against startup loneliness.

programs.name: Threshold (UK) — upcoming
programs.status_detail: Flagged as an upcoming UK founder program. As of June 2026 there is little public/indexed information — placeholder pending verification of location, terms & operator.
programs.highlight: UNVERIFIED — added on user tip; confirm details before relying on this entry.

programs.name: The Residency — Inventors (SF)
programs.focus: Inventors — researchers, founders & creatives doing something novel
programs.status_detail: The Inventors Residency: high-agency builders lock in for 12 weeks to make something never done before.
programs.highlight: SF 'inventors' house in The Residency network.

programs.name: The Residency — SF2
programs.focus: Hardware & deep tech — humanoid robots, BCIs, rockets
programs.status_detail: 'A hacker house like no other': rapid iteration, ship-fast energy; robots in the bedrooms, rocket launches in the backyard.
programs.highlight: SF deep-tech house in The Residency network.

programs.name: The Residency — Odyssey (SF)
programs.status_detail: 'If what you're building is so ambitious it scares you — Odyssey is for you.'
programs.highlight: SF 'purpose-driven' house in The Residency network.

programs.name: The Residency — Biopunk (SF)
programs.focus: Biotech — community biolab; DIY, rebellious, collaborative
programs.status_detail: Community biolab and home for biologists & the wildly curious; late-night CRISPR and open lab nights.
programs.highlight: SF biotech house in The Residency network.

programs.name: The Residency — v2 (Vancouver)
programs.focus: Creative technologists — artistic taste meets tech
programs.status_detail: Spacious Vancouver home blending art and engineering; many residents from Atelier (Vancouver's Socratica).
programs.highlight: Canada house in The Residency network.

programs.name: The Founding Co. (Hyderabad)
programs.focus: Founders already in motion — costs covered + stipend
programs.status_detail: Hyderabad's first dedicated founder hacker house: 12 founders, full costs covered, monthly stipend, weekly demo days & investor intros.
programs.highlight: High-accountability Indian founder house surfaced via The Residency network.

programs.name: Focal Founder Residency
programs.status_detail: 3+ month fully in-person residency at The LAB Miami (Wynwood); Miami relocation required (all co-founders), 6 days/wk, 10 founders, costs offset, optional $25K–$50K SAFE. Winter 2026 cohort started Jan 2026 — check site for next.
programs.highlight: 'All the firepower of a top accelerator without the heavy dilution' — but genuinely residential (you relocate to Miami).

programs.name: Frontier Tower (BerlinHouse)
programs.focus: Frontier tech & arts — AI, crypto, biotech, longevity, deep tech
programs.operator: Jakob Drzazga & Christian Nagel (Deep Ink Ventures)
programs.status_detail: 16-floor 'vertical village' at 995 Market St with 8 themed labs + co-living residences. Originally named Berlin House.
programs.highlight: A whole tower as a hacker house — co-living floors stacked over themed frontier-tech labs.

programs.name: Hive Coliving (Founder House)
programs.status_detail: 50-bedroom co-living + co-working house at 1040 Folsom St, SoMa.
programs.highlight: Large SoMa co-living house oriented to founders & builders.

programs.name: Launch House
programs.operator: Michael Houck, Brett Goldstein & Jacob Peters
programs.status_detail: Pioneered the 4-week live-in residency (a Beverly Hills mansion) + year-long community; the live-in model later wound down / pivoted. Listed for reference.
programs.highlight: Iconic early-2020s 'new-age hacker house' that popularized the live-in founder residency.

programs.name: Hexa House
programs.status_detail: New SF home for AI founders, opened by European startup studio Hexa as its Bay Area base.
programs.highlight: Hexa's US expansion — a live-and-build house for AI founders.

programs.name: Project6
programs.status_detail: Runs 48-hour founder residencies in rented mansions; first cohorts (2026) in Johor Bahru, Kuala Lumpur & Singapore (with AI.SEA).
programs.highlight: Southeast-Asian experiment in ultra-short, intense founder residencies.

programs.name: SHACK15
programs.status_detail: 46,000 sq ft community & coworking club in the Ferry Building (Scandinavian design). Not residential, but a major founder gathering hub.
programs.highlight: SF's Ferry Building founder community & events club.

programs.name: Bili House
programs.focus: AI, dev tools & B2B startup founders
programs.status_detail: Rolling applications; 1–3 month stays ($500–$2,000/mo). 7,000 sq ft waterfront house on Meydenbauer Bay with pool and boat dock.
programs.highlight: Seattle area's flagship founder hacker house — waterfront mansion in Bellevue supporting the Pacific Northwest startup scene.

programs.name: Hacker Residency Group
programs.operator: Travis Fischer, Tony Dinh & Minh-Phuc Tran
programs.status_detail: 6-week live-in batches (Batch 2 ran Apr–Jun 2026) in a 14-bedroom ocean-view villa. Completely free: no equity, no revenue share. Demo day with livestream + up to $100K funding for top teams.
programs.highlight: Led by world-class indie hackers (Tony Dinh: $1M+ ARR solo; Travis Fischer: 2 exits). Vietnam's premier founder residency.

programs.name: Yale Entrepreneurial Society Hacker House
programs.operator: Yale Entrepreneurial Society (Leia Ryan & Oliver Hime)
programs.status_detail: Summer 2026 (late May–July): 12 Yale founders in a Nob Hill house for 10 weeks. Sponsored by Raymond Tonsing (Caffeinated Capital). First edition.
programs.highlight: Yale's first SF hacker house — elite student founders plugging directly into the Bay Area ecosystem for a summer.

programs.name: SILTA
programs.focus: Finnish early-stage founders; US market validation, fundraising
programs.status_detail: Takes top Finnish founders to the SF Bay Area to live & build together for 12 weeks (6-wk option), twice/yr. Mentors incl. YC partners & VCs. Spring'27 cohort applications open Oct 2026.
programs.highlight: A Finnish founder house in Silicon Valley — a cohort that crosses the Atlantic to live and build together for a season.

programs.name: The Bridge (by Entrepreneurs First)
programs.focus: Pre-team/pre-idea founders; cofounder matching → company building
programs.status_detail: 8-wk SF residency: apply solo, get matched, then live & build together in a Bay Area hacker house. Housing + board + visa support. EF invests $250K ($125K for 8% SAFE + optional $125K MFN). Runs 3 cohorts in 2026 (Apr/Jul closed); next Fall'26 cohort opening soon.
programs.highlight: EF's relocation residency — cofounder matching that moves into an SF hacker house for 8 weeks.

programs.name: Boost VC
programs.focus: Sci-fi / deep tech — crypto, space, biotech, robotics, AR/VR, AI
programs.status_detail: 3-month live-in accelerator, twice/yr (~20 startups/Tribe, now ~Tribe 18). $500K for equity; founders housed together at Draper University across from the incubator. Rolling apps between Tribes.
programs.highlight: One of the original live-in accelerators — founders move into Draper University and build together for a full Tribe.
